MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - LARRY WHITE, TEL. NO. 1-760-348-7000 EXT. 5165, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. SHARON M. NAGLE OF THE BOLD, POLLISNER, MADDOW & JUDSON LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-925-933-7777 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS HONORABLE PAUL ALVARADO AND HONORABLE CAROL YAGGY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. A quo warranto action can only be filed by the California attorney general. (CCP 803.) Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/ru
